articles.title: As more Americans embrace anxiety treatment, RFK Jr. derides medications - CBS News
articles.description: Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has criticized the broadening use of anxiety medications, but doctors and researchers say the MAHA movement is misrepresenting drugs that have been proven to help.
articles.content: After a grueling year of chemotherapy, surgery, and radiation to treat breast cancer, Sadia Zapp was anxious — not the manageable hum that had long been part of her life, but something deeper, more d… [+9280 chars]
